rows.cycle_goal_summary: Inspect and use the nearby shared chest to prepare a contribution to shared storage (or create a first contribution workflow if empty/uncertain).
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Deposit a small, role-allowed set of useful items into the inspected chest (or, if deposit is blocked by allowed-items/rules or lack of suitable items, record the reason and pivot to obtaining/crafting the minimal contribution items).
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=deposit_shared, statuses=deposit_shared:blocked.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Determine why the last deposit was blocked (allowed-items mismatch vs chest accessibility vs missing eligible items), then pivot to the nearest executable prerequisite: gather or craft the smallest valid contribution item set for the shared home, suitable for a later deposit.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=collect_logs, statuses=collect_logs:collected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Find the minimal eligible contribution item(s) Jun can obtain/craft immediately based on reachable material inventory, while confirming chest accessibility/openability constraints captured by the chest inspection snapshot.
